embeds.title: The Hidden Science of Morimens Team Building
embeds.description:
Welcome back to Part 2 of my Beginner Guide Series, in this video im covering the different Realms in Morimens and how to build competent Teams!

Thumbnail Credit: https://x.com/annaxxe_

Time Stamps

0:00 - 0:32 - Intro
0:33 - 7:46 -

Accidentally got Pontos and trying to figure out what characters he could work with.
If its a card drawer there are a few options. Ramona, Tawil or Faros might help.
But do note Faros allows you to only pick three cards with her exalt and Ramona’s exalt lets you pick one card with an arithmetica cost of 0.
You could also use a posse that lets you draw cards. Hameln has a card that allows you to draw 2 insight cards but what you get depends on what cards you have in your deck.
You could also slot Pontos into a discard team w Corpo+Aurita+Cassiah pretty painlessly
Guys is Castor, Jenkins, Arachne, Clem a good team for story arc 2

i don't have Cass, can I slot Saya in her place?
Think it's fine? I admittedly never bothered trying Saya+discard team but there's no reason she wouldn't fit right in. You're just losing out on a 4 card draw Exalt from Cass
And ig the Ultra realm

Worth noting, Cass only really goes online for Discard in arc2. So Saya's prob better before then

Well worth picking them up as soon as you can gather them. You can't farm substats 'til 45, but just getting the baseline set is a big boost for very cheap (in most cases). Some of the sets in the shop cost a currency you'll like want to spend elsewhere for now, mainly Cursed Rabbit/Re-evolution.
